scripts.dev: pnpm exec kill-port 5173 || true; pnpm exec vite --host
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck
scripts.clean:all: pnpm exec rimraf dist release node_modules
scripts.electron:dev: pnpm exec concurrently -k "pnpm exec vite" "pnpm exec wait-on http://localhost:5173 && pnpm exec electron ."
scripts.electron:build: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:linux: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec electron-builder --linux
scripts.electron:build:mac: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec electron-builder --mac
scripts.cap:sync: pnpm exec vite build && pnpm exec cap sync
scripts.report:all: pnpm report:lint && pnpm report:typecheck && pnpm report:test && pnpm report:coverage && pnpm report:a11y && pnpm report:lighthouse && pnpm report:security && pnpm report:build
scripts.report:lint: echo "Lint Report:" && pnpm lint || echo "Lint failed"
scripts.report:typecheck: echo "Typecheck Report:" && pnpm typecheck || echo "Typecheck failed"
scripts.report:test: echo "Test Report:" && pnpm test || echo "Test failed"
scripts.report:coverage: echo "Coverage Report:" && pnpm test:coverage || echo "Coverage failed"
scripts.report:a11y: echo "Accessibility Report:" && pnpm test:a11y || echo "A11y failed"
scripts.report:lighthouse: echo "Lighthouse Report:" && pnpm lighthouse || echo "Lighthouse failed"
scripts.report:security: echo "Security Report:" && pnpm audit || echo "Security failed"
scripts.report:build: echo "Build Report:" && pnpm build || echo "Build failed"
